metric_name: BestBuy: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
metric_value: At Best Buy stores this week, save $100 to $150 with Best Buy's mail-in rebate on all computer packages. Also receive no interest financing for 18 months on all these CPU bundles.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
metric_value: Save up to $350 on all Desktop Computer Packages and enjoy no interest for 12 months. Circuitcity.com has free shipping on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
metric_value: No weekly advertisements appeared in this week's Boston Globe or Atlanta Journal-Constitution. CompUSA.com tends to continue selling "older" PC models after BestBuy.com and CircuitCity.com have removed them.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
metric_value: This week's deals at Dell for the 2350 include a free CD burner in the second bay, a free upgrade to a 60 GB hard drive, and a free upgrade to 256 MB of DDR memory. Dell offers free shipping, hard drive upgrades, and CD burners in the second bay on all its other models.

metric_name: EMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
metric_value: EMachines has once again revamped its line of models. If you were thinking about buying a T2460, T2042, or T1842, you're now out of luck because these models are gone from all the usual sources we check.

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
metric_value: Receive the Sims basic software package for free this week at Gateway Online. Gateway.com has finally joined the free shipping bandwagon for good.

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
metric_value: Sony.com offers a plethora of models right now, although, like eMachines, the best deals usually come from bundled retail offers. Receive free shipping, and a free Epson C42UX printer after mail-in rebate at Sony Online this week.

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-05-18
